title: Prefer generators and comprehensions over map and lambda for creating collections
description: Using map and lambda functions to create collections can be less efficient and harder to read than using generators and comprehensions.
message: Prefer using generators and comprehensions to create collections.
recommendation: Rewrite code using generators or comprehensions

noncompliant.description: Using map and lambda to square a list of numbers

compliant.description: Using a list comprehension to square a list of numbers
Using a generator expression to square a list of numbers

why_is_this_an_issue: Map and lambda can be less efficient due to creating additional temporary lists or objects, and can be harder to read compared to generators and comprehensions.
how_to_fix: Rewrite the code using generators or comprehensions.

checks.message: Prefer using generators and comprehensions to create collections instead of map.
Prefer using generators and comprehensions to create collections instead of lambda.

metadata.title: Prefer generators and comprehensions over map and lambda for creating collections
